schedule.description: FIFTY Wins — Season Arc Bold Take
Trade Deadline 25 Days — Detmers, Gray, Mize

stories.title: Cubs 6, Cardinals 4 — Series Finale Recap
stories.angle: Cubs avoided the sweep Sunday, beating the Cardinals 6-4. Assad was scoreless into the 5th. Four-run sixth via two Cardinals errors — Hoerner's RBI single, then three more on Fermin and Walker throwing errors — turned a 3-2 deficit into a 6-3 lead. Pomeranz earned his first win as a Cub since rejoining Friday. Webb closed out for save No. 3. Cubs now 50-40.

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Cubs dodged the sweep Sunday, 6-4.

Assad held St. Louis scoreless into the 5th. Then the Cardinals handed Chicago the decisive inning — two errors turned a 3-2 deficit into a 6-3 lead.

Pomeranz earns his first Cubs win. Webb shuts it down. Cubs 50-40.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: FIFTY Wins — Bold Take on the Season Arc
stories.angle: Cubs reached 50 wins (50-40) and sit at No. 2 in the NL wild card race — all while five starting pitchers remain on the IL. The team hasn't played a full game yet.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
FIFTY wins.

50-40, No. 2 NL wild card — and the five starters on the IL haven't returned yet.

This team isn't playing its full hand.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

stories.title: Owen Ayers — Prospect Spotlight
stories.angle: Cubs No. 9 prospect Owen Ayers homered for the 21st time this year Saturday at Double-A Knoxville. A 19th-round pick in 2024 who starred in the Arizona Fall League, Ayers hit .455 with an .830 slugging % in June at Knoxville. The farm is producing while the big-league rotation is battered.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Owen Ayers, Cubs No. 9 prospect, hit his 21st homer of the year Saturday.

He was a 19th-round pick in 2024. He batted .455 with an .830 slugging % in June at Double-A Knoxville.

The draft slot means nothing.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

stories.title: Trade Deadline 25 Days Out — Detmers, Gray, Mize
stories.angle: 25 days until the July 31 deadline. Cubs are buyers. Reid Detmers (Angels, controlled through 2028) is emerging as a top target alongside Sonny Gray (Red Sox, 9-1, 2.69 ERA) and Casey Mize (Detroit, 2.63 ERA). Chicago is still missing five starters — Steele, Brown, Horton, Cabrera, Taillon. Jed Hoyer must act.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
25 days to the deadline. The Cubs are buyers.

Reid Detmers (Angels, controlled through 2028) is emerging as a top target alongside Gray and Mize. Chicago is still missing five rotation starters.

Jed Hoyer. Move.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Taillon Rehab Update — Return Timeline Before All-Star Break
stories.angle: Jameson Taillon made his first rehab start Saturday at Class-A South Bend. If it goes to plan, he makes one more minor-league outing and returns to face the Reds in Cincinnati before the All-Star break (July 14). Edward Cabrera, Daniel Palencia, and Ethan Roberts are also on their way back.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Jameson Taillon made his first rehab start Saturday at South Bend.

The plan: one more outing, then a potential return in Cincinnati before the All-Star break.

Cabrera, Palencia, and Roberts are also on the way back.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

stories.title: Baltimore Series Preview
stories.angle: The Cubs open a 3-game series at Baltimore starting Tuesday at 5:35 PM CT. At 50-40 and holding the No. 2 NL wild card position, the second half starts now.

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The Cubs head to Baltimore for a three-game series starting Tuesday at 5:35 PM CT.

50-40 and holding the No. 2 NL wild card. Now comes the hard part — staying there.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB
